posts.name: Twinsen
posts.cooked:
[b]Little Big Adventure 2

  • White T-Shirt Mod -[/b]

Description:

This mod came to existence because of the original concept where Twinsen was supposed to wear a white T-Shirt. Such reference can still be seen in the games intro movie. Also, a preview of LBA2, also known to have been in beta stage has clearly shown screenshots where Twinsen was wearing his original white T-Shirt.

Note:

The original version of LBA2 was meant to contain other different elements such as a modified ferry, gaining access to the top of the lighthouse, modified areas of some islands, a blue sky in the undergas level, etc. but unfortunately I could only bring Twinsens T-Shirt back

Installation:

Extract the RESS.HQR file inside the archive into the LBA2/TO installation directory, overwriting the existing one. (Be sure to make a backup first!) Enjoy!

LBA2_WTSM.zip (429 KB)

Always give some screenshots.

I think OBrasilo already did this a while ago, but still its a good mod to use for those who like to mod LBA2 instead of LBA1

Btw, I see you only change Twinsens outfit texture, right?!
well, I was the first one to ever mod LBA2. I changed Twinsens wizard robe, gave it my avatar as pattern.
I think I remember that mod

posts.name: Twinsen
posts.cooked: yeah, I just replaced the texture but the hard thing was that pure white (255,255,255) didnt work I figure pure white has some transparency problems as the gourad sharing was showing weird red-orange-brown-yellow patterns like lava on the TShirt so what I did was take the LBA2 palette and pick the closest white that I could and the surprise was that it was exactly the white they used in the LBA2 preview also, here are the shots :

oh sorry, well i mean how he modified RESS.HQR, yes;).

Using one of the fan-made programs to extract files from *.HQR packages.
Zinks Package Editor for instance.

posts.name: Twinsen
posts.cooked: yes so basically Ive hacked the RESS.HQR archive by extracting one single file I needed ( entry #7 if I recall correctly ), opened it with LBAWinOwns Image Creator program, located Twinsens shirt texture, and recolored it as I wanted ( note: that is NOT 255/255/255 at all its a very light gray I think it was 224/224/224 if I recally correctly )
